name: Southern Cross Goldfields
description: Southern Cross Gold Consolidated Ltd is a natural resources company focused on the exploration of gold and antimony, primarily within the Victorian Goldfields of Australia. The company's flagship asset is the Sunday Creek project, a high-grade discovery located north of Melbourne. Listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) with CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs) on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), the firm aims to discover and develop large, long-life, sustainable mineral assets. It maintains corporate offices in both Vancouver, Canada, and Melbourne, Australia, while actively exploring multiple prospective mineralized trends.
